notes: WHEEL OF FORTUNE's six-face arcana die. HOUSE FOLDS is the highest success — the wheel admits the night. BUST is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The wheel goes where you wanted. The house margin holds. Advance two.
Success ★. The pull breaks even. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The hesitation on Q3 again. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 TILT).
Partial. The float runs a little wider. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 TILT).
Failure. The house took it. +1 TILT. The bachelor party screams again.
Wild. ★★ if you have CASHED OUT this turn — the cage is on your side. Otherwise: failure, and the neon hum settles a half-tone lower.
